name: Crazy 38's
author: Ben Good (1998) — AGP port
description: Crazy 38's (Ben Good, 1998), a Recognized Chess Variant entered in Hans Bodlaender's 38-square challenge. Standard-ish chess/shogi pieces (King, Rook, Bishop, Knight, plus custom Silver and Gold generals and short-range Pawns) battle on a knotted 38-diamond board whose curved 'tip' cells create a loop-effect for the sliding pieces. Captured pieces switch sides and may be dropped back like shogi. Win by checkmate or by marching your King onto the opponent's home square.
